name: io.github.whitemagic-ai/whitemagic
description: Cognitive operating system for AI agents — persistent memory, associative recall, ethical governance, and self-awareness across sessions. Single 'wm' meta-tool covering 490 dispatch tools across 28 Ganas, organized by the Chinese Lunar Mansions.

environmentVariables.name: WM_MCP_PRAT
environmentVariables.description: Set to 2 for Seed mode (1 tool: wm, default), 1 for PRAT mode (29 tools), or 0 for classic mode (490 tools)

environmentVariables.name: WM_SILENT_INIT
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to suppress startup logs

environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_HOST
environmentVariables.description: URL for local Ollama LLM server (optional, for local inference)
